name: MorCad CAD Viewer
description: Renders DXF/DWG engineering drawings inline as code blocks
author: zouwei
aiHint:
Use ```dxf for DXF files, ```dwg for DWG files, or ```morcad for parameter mode. Examples:
```dxf
./drawings/floor-plan.dxf
```
```morcad
file: ./drawings/floor-plan.dxf
layers: WALLS, DOORS
height: 500
```
